en-US.title: PodDigest
en-US.subtitle: AI Podcast Episode Summaries
en-US.description:
PodDigest turns a podcast episode into a quick, readable summary so you can decide whether it's worth your time.

- Paste an Apple Podcasts or RSS link and browse recent episodes
- Generate an AI summary as bullet points or a short paragraph
- Get notified when a show you follow publishes a new episode
- Revisit past summaries and keep a favorites list
- Use PodDigest in English or Chinese

Summaries are generated by Claude (Anthropic) from the episode's show notes.

zh-Hant.title: PodDigest
zh-Hant.subtitle: AI Podcast 節目摘要
zh-Hant.description:
PodDigest 幫你把冗長的 Podcast 節目說明快速轉成好讀的摘要，讓你先判斷這集值不值得花時間收聽。

- 貼上 Apple Podcasts 或 RSS 連結，瀏覽近期集數
- 產生條列式重點或短文摘要
- 訂閱節目後，有新集數會推播通知你
- 查看歷史摘要紀錄、建立收藏清單
- 支援中文／英文介面切換

摘要由 Anthropic 的 Claude 依節目說明文字生成。
